body:
Benchmark: Cursor Composer 2 vs Claude Sonnet vs GPT-4o on real dev tasks

Task: Refactor a 500-line Django service

Composer 2:    18s | 1,200 tokens | pass
Claude Sonnet: 31s | 2,100 tokens | pass
GPT-4o:        29s | 1,950 tokens | pass

Winner on speed + efficiency: Composer 2

Try it: https://cursor.so/?ref=printmaxx

#AIBenchmark #DevTools
